input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 1.1.5 tests reference legacy org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor/TypedProps APIs that are absent from the 2.0.0-M1 pekko-actor_2.13 jar; this is an API-removal/test-update issue, not missing setup.
Pekko typed actors live under org.apache.pekko.actor.typed and are a separate module; adding that dependency would change the target surface rather than fix setup for pekko-actor_2.13.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, or environment/system property is required for meaningful pekko-actor_2.13 coverage; the 2.0.0-M1 artifact directly depends only on scala-library and typesafe config, and local actor-system usage is self-contained.
